message:
fix(writing): improve Bakery article layout and mobile performance

Enhance the Bakery Algorithm article with better hero section layout
and optimized 3D visualization performance on mobile devices.

bakery-article.tsx:
- Add missing framer-motion import for hero animations
- Improve hero section badge layout with flex-wrap for mobile
- Add subtle scale animation on initial load
- Enhance reading time display with better mobile sizing

bakery-visualizations.tsx:
- Reduce mobile star count from 1000 to 800 for performance
- Decrease mobile ticket count from 30 to 20
- Adjust camera position for better mobile framing (z: 120 -> 140)
- Reduce star opacity from 0.3 to 0.2 for subtler background
- Fix spiral geometry with mobile-specific angle multiplier
- Add haptic feedback hook import for future touch interactions
- Add Layers icon import for potential UI enhancements
- Fix CSS property: shadow -> boxShadow in TemporalCard

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
